expert_mlp_semantics: FFN expert MLP: W1 matmul, optional expert bias, element-wise gelu_tanh, W2 matmul, optional output bias.
expert_path_semantics: MegaBlocks expert path means dispatch metadata, sort/binning, gather, expert MLP compute, and weighted scatter/combine. Lower-level phase profiling splits this into sort, histogram, cumsum, gather, expert MLP, and scatter/combine.
gate_multiply_location: Gate multiply and reduce back to token rows are folded into MegaBlocks weighted scatter/combine: ops.binned_scatter for standard MoE and ops.scatter for dMoE.
gate_weight_semantics: Gate weights are row-wise softmax over the selected top-k router logits.
label: nano_moe_jax_megablocks_moe_cuda_tok512_t128_float32_trained_nano_checkpoint
moe_op_profile_note: Disjoint diagnostic replay. Components are non-overlapping logical MoE blocks and their sum is reported, but split replay is not the authoritative production latency. Use mean_forward_ms for whole-layer latency. expert_path is one real MegaBlocks dispatch/sort/gather, expert MLP, and weighted scatter/combine unit. Gate multiply is folded into weighted scatter/combine. Lower-level gather/MLP/scatter timings require --phase-profile.
routing_semantics: Nano-compatible adapter routing: router projection matmul; full row-wise softmax over expert logits for aux/load-balance probabilities; top-k over raw logits; row-wise softmax over selected top-k logits for gate weights.
softmax_location: In current Nano-compatible MegaBlocks runs, softmax is explicit adapter-side routing work. It is not inside the timed MegaBlocks expert path.
topk_location: In current Nano-compatible MegaBlocks runs, top-k selection is explicit adapter-side routing work over raw router logits.

label: nano_moe_jax_megablocks_dmoe_cuda_tok262144_t128_bfloat16_trained_nano_checkpoint
moe_op_profile_note: Disjoint diagnostic replay. Components are non-overlapping logical MoE blocks and their sum is reported, but split replay is not the authoritative production latency. Use mean_forward_ms for whole-layer latency. expert_path is one real MegaBlocks dispatch/sort/gather, expert MLP, and weighted scatter/combine unit. Gate multiply is folded into weighted scatter/combine. Lower-level gather/MLP/scatter timings require --phase-profile.
routing_semantics: Nano-compatible adapter routing: router projection matmul; full row-wise softmax over expert logits for aux/load-balance probabilities; top-k over raw logits; row-wise softmax over selected top-k logits for gate weights.
softmax_location: In current Nano-compatible MegaBlocks runs, softmax is explicit adapter-side routing work. It is not inside the timed MegaBlocks expert path.
topk_location: In current Nano-compatible MegaBlocks runs, top-k selection is explicit adapter-side routing work over raw router logits.

expert_mlp_semantics: FFN expert MLP: W1 matmul, optional expert bias, element-wise gelu_tanh, W2 matmul, optional output bias.
expert_path_semantics: MegaBlocks expert path means dispatch metadata, sort/binning, gather, expert MLP compute, and weighted scatter/combine. Lower-level phase profiling splits this into sort, histogram, cumsum, gather, expert MLP, and scatter/combine.
gate_multiply_location: Gate multiply and reduce back to token rows are folded into MegaBlocks weighted scatter/combine: ops.binned_scatter for standard MoE and ops.scatter for dMoE.
gate_weight_semantics: Gate weights are row-wise softmax over the selected top-k router logits.
label: nano_moe_jax_megablocks_dmoe_cuda_tok524288_t128_bfloat16_trained_nano_checkpoint
